languages_and_tools: Node.js runtime for hook guard evaluation
detected_stack.root_build_tooling: none detected at the repository root

verification_commands.command: git rev-parse --show-toplevel; git status --short --branch; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD
verification_commands.output_summary: repo root C:/workspaces/CCSIF; branch main; HEAD e9358b553a9a05c16de00af28e35a9f29e5b16b1; untracked roadmap/docs files already present before baseline scaffolding

verification_commands.command: Get-Content -Raw .claude/state/execution-manifest.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; $base = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.claude/state'; $resolved = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $base '../../docs/claude-code-control-plane-roadmap-v2.md')); if (!(Test-Path $resolved)) { throw 'missing roadmap link target' }
verification_commands.output_summary: manifest parsed; baseline, matrix, and ledger exist; roadmap link target resolves to docs/claude-code-control-plane-roadmap-v2.md

machine_global.notes: No active repository file requires `~/.claude/*` or other host-specific Claude state. The roadmap text references those paths as dependencies to avoid, not as live requirements. `.claude/settings.local.json` uses only project-local placeholders.

known_risks: The repository already has unrelated untracked files outside `.claude/state/`; they were left untouched.
Phase 0 durable state and the rest of `.claude/state/` are still only scaffolded at the baseline layer.
The roadmap's Phase 4 section has no explicit exit-criteria block, so the matrix records that gap rather than inventing one.
Existing files prove repository surface area, not full runtime behavior; the matrix separates presence from verification.
next_goal: Implement the minimum Phase 0 durable-state primitives under `.claude/state/` (logs, checkpoints, session metadata) without broadening scope into later phases.
